title: Inbox signature verification does not require digest in signed headers
description: In inbox.rs verify_and_fetch_actor(), after parsing the Signature header, there is no check that sig_params.headers_list contains 'digest'. A remote server can send a valid signature that covers only (request-target) and host, omitting the digest header. This allows body substitution: an attacker can replace the activity JSON body without invalidating the signature. Fix: after parsing sig_params, reject if \!sig_params.headers_list.contains('digest').
